Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Hebrew/Arabic translation toggle to all study modes

- Add local translationLang state to each mode \(not using global language context\)
- FlashcardMode: Toggle button in header, example sentences stay in English
- QuizMode: Toggle in intro screen, questions regenerate when language changes
- MatchingMode: Toggle in intro screen, column header updates dynamically
- SpellingMode: Toggle in intro screen, translation hint updates
- WordScrambleMode: Toggle in intro screen, word hint updates

Students can now switch between Hebrew \(עברית\) and Arabic \(عربي\) translations
while keeping example sentences in English only.

EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Implement code-based authentication with enhanced security \(v1.1\)

Security Features:
- Hashed codes with bcrypt \(via Supabase auth\)
- Device fingerprinting and new device detection
- Login attempt logging for audit trail
- Account lockout after 5 failed attempts \(15 min\)
- Teacher controls to reset student codes
- Progressive delays on failed logins

New Files:
- src/lib/code-auth.ts - Device hashing, login logging, account locking
- src/app/api/students/[id]/reset-code/route.ts - Reset student code API
- supabase/migrations/20260307_code_based_auth_security.sql - Security tables

Modified Files:
- src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx - Added security checks to signIn flow
- src/app/page.tsx - New device alerts, account locked messages
- src/app/teacher/dashboard/page.tsx - Student management section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
